title: AspectValueDistribution

localizedAspectValue.description: The value of an aspect. For example, Red is a value for the aspect Color.

matchCount.description: The number of items with this aspect.

refinementHref.description: A HATEOAS reference for this aspect.

description: The container that defines the fields for the conditions refinements. This container is returned when fieldgroups is set to ASPECT_REFINEMENTS or FULL in the request.
